title: 川崎記念の後に・ぎゅるるん！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon is crazy fast! She's almost too good...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely good enough to run
internationally! I'd love to hear that
announcement someday.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wooow...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm sure all of you here today are big dirt fans...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna get you even more hyped! Keep up
the support, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This win is an important first step! We're just
getting started!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: See? I won without overdoing it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You know, you could act a bit more excited...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Geez, use some intonation! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, if I keep getting even stronger...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'll be able to win any race I enter, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Even international races, for example!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon blew the audience away with a
stunning run today.
choice_data_list: With skills like yours, you can do well anywhere!
With skills like yours, you can do well anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ☆ That's right!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I could debut internationally, it would open up
so many new stages to me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Just imagine if I could spread love for Umadols all
over the world...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe there'd be, like, a Falco Queendom
populated by only my fans!
choice_data_list: Talk about shooting for the stars...
Talk about shooting for the stars...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come on, you know I'm joking! I've got my eye on
something else right now...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm gonna go get changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tough races are going to keep on coming. In
order to get through them, I want to make sure
Smart Falcon is getting sufficient nourishment,
body and soul.
choice_data_list: Do you want to celebrate with some yakiniku?
Do you want to celebrate with some yakiniku?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yakiniku...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon would normally be happy to join
me, but today...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I really wanna go, but I'll have to pass today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know how hard I work. I wanna get ready for
my next race. ☆
choice_data_list: All right. Let's just head straight home, then.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a big celebration bash when
everything's all over!
